REGENTFEMPORTRAITS.mod_desc: Replace card portraits for the Regent character with beautiful anime-style artwork, with multiple anti-aliasing filter options.
REGENTFEMPORTRAITS-ENABLE_ANTIALIASING_F: When enabled, texture filtering will be applied to card portraits to reduce aliasing during scaled previews. Recommended for better visual effects.
Choose the texture filtering mode for card portraits. Different modes affect clarity and edge smoothness. Linear with Anisotropic is recommended.
REGENTFEMPORTRAITS-SELECTED_FILTER_MODE-: Sharp, preserves pixel art style, may have noticeable aliasing. Suitable for pixel art style.
Smooth display with slightly blurred edges. Suitable for large image display.
Balances clarity and performance, uses lower resolution Mipmap for scaled previews.
Smooth edges, reduced aliasing, uses Mipmap to maintain scaling quality.
High clarity, maintains sharpness at oblique viewing angles, anisotropic filtering improves angular viewing effects.
Smoothest filtering effect, recommended for scaled previews. Combines the advantages of linear filtering, Mipmap, and anisotropic filtering.
REGENTFEMPORTRAITS-TEXTURE_QUALITY.title: Texture Quality
REGENTFEMPORTRAITS-TEXTURE_QUALITY.hover: Controls texture compression level. Higher quality uses more video memory but provides clearer card portrait display.
REGENTFEMPORTRAITS-ENABLE_SOVEREIGN_BLAD: When enabled, SovereignBlade card portrait will be replaced with anime artwork and displayed in Ancient style. Disable to show original card portrait.
